command:
until pg_isready; do
  echo 'Waiting to start...'
  sleep 5
done

cd /config
shopt -s nullglob
for sql in {0,9}*.sql; do
    echo "$0: running $sql"
    psql -v ON_ERROR_STOP=0 -f "$sql"
done
containers.name: postgres-init

constant_value:
until pg_isready; do
  echo 'Waiting to start...'
  sleep 5
done

cd /config
shopt -s nullglob
for sql in {0,9}*.sql; do

configmap.description: keys must be *.conf files used for /etc/postgresql
